mapper.select:
SELECT ce.event_type as eventType, count(DISTINCT concat(cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier, '_', p_ce.stable_id)) as count FROM clinical_event ce JOIN patient p_ce ON ce.patient_id = p_ce.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs_ce ON p_ce.cancer_study_id = cs_ce.cancer_study_id
concat(cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier, '_', p_ce.stable_id) in ( SELECT patient_unique_id FROM sample_derived
sample_unique_id IN ()
)
GROUP BY ce.event_type
